hypothesis: Remove duplicate Organization schema - index.html and SEO.tsx both inject it, causing every page to have two copies
diff_summary: Removed organizationSchema from allStructuredData array. index.html keeps the complete version.

hypothesis: Shorten homepage meta title from 81 to 58 chars for optimal SERP display
diff_summary: Title: Card Payment Processing UK | Rocket Payments (58 chars)

hypothesis: Auto-generate canonical URLs for every page when not explicitly provided
diff_summary: Added canonicalUrl auto-generation using window.location.pathname, also always sets og:url

diff_summary: Shortened og:title and twitter:title to match 58-char meta title
